_comment: v4-hybrid -- v2's PPE-tight 30 prompts (proven detected-tier confidence on the corpus sweep) + 3 targeted additions for items the operator's original 33-class spec carried that v2 had silently dropped or under-covered: concrete_honeycomb (now two CLIP-aligned phrasings), and fall_hazard_unprotected. v3's wholesale 38-prompt rewrite from the original spec was reverted after pilot showed PPE confidence dropped a full tier from softmax competition + 'misaligned concrete column' fired as a false positive on a metal pipe. The integer class id YOLO emits is the index into this list -- order STABLE; edit + re-bake to change.
